ShipStation Automation Check-up: Jorge Castro

Jonathan Carucci with VenturaPet Solutions, LLC
Recorded on May 29, 2026 via Zoom, 45m



Participants

Auctane
Jonathan Carucci, Customer Success Associate

VenturaPet Solutions, LLC
Jorge Castro



Transcript

0:00 | Jonathan
hello? Can you hear me? Jorge? Yes. Can you? Alright? Yes, I can hear you. How is it going? Excellent. Alright. Thank you for setting up this meeting. Usually Friday meetings are a little bit difficult to start but I think we're focused on what we have to do here. So I just want to introduce myself. My name is Jonathan. I am part of the account managing team. It's about five or six of us in this department. We do look at overall health of accounts to see what we can do to optimize and better your workflow answer any questions, things like that. I would like to get to know a little bit about you, your position within the company, your company, a little bit of what it is that you guys are focusing on. And then the reason why you booked this meeting. I know there's an automations pop up that probably popped up to set up this meeting, but I'm pretty sure you might have some ideas or questions that you might have of maybe automating something a workflow. And yeah, just like to get to know a little bit before we get this meeting started?

Perfect. Well, not really. The reason I booked the meeting was because there was like a message… saying that my automations were not currently… like optimize or something. So I said, okay, let's see what we can do better with this… platform. This company is practically, it's only me, it's running the company. And shipstation is used by a third party who is helping me with the logistics. Yeah. So what we do is we sell merchandising… related to dog lovers. So we go with stickers, we do T shirts, we do different kind of stuff and we have it in a recurring business model. So it's like a club they subscribe in order to start receiving different type of merchandise. And that's more that's what we do. And, yeah, I don't know.
